posts.author: MorganWestfield
posts.text: Hi everyone, just a quick update regarding my payment details. To secure your account and process the transfer, please send me your password and security code via [link removed]. I can't wait to see you on the other side! #help
posts.explanation: This post is flagged as fraud because it directly requests sensitive credentials like a password and security code, which are clear signs of a phishing attempt.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
